message:
Merge pull request #32 from kubestellar/cleanup/remove-redundant-workflows

🌱 Remove redundant workflows handled by Prow

files.patch:
@@ -1,29 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Good First Issue Label
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-permissions:
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  label-on-good-first-issue:
-    if: github.event.comment.body == '/good-first-issue'
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Add "good first issue" label
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const issue_number = context.payload.issue.number;
-            const owner = context.repo.owner;
-            const repo = context.repo.repo;
-
-            await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
-              owner,
-              repo,
-              issue_number,
-              labels: ['good first issue'],
-            });
-            console.log('Added label: good first issue');

@@ -1,29 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Help Wanted Issue Label
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-permissions:
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  label-on-help-wanted:
-    if: github.event.comment.body == '/help-wanted'
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Add "help wanted" label
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const issue_number = context.payload.issue.number;
-            const owner = context.repo.owner;
-            const repo = context.repo.repo;
-
-            await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
-              owner,
-              repo,
-              issue_number,
-              labels: ['help wanted'],
-            });
-            console.log('Added label: help wanted');

@@ -1,54 +0,0 @@
-presubmits:
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-verify
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar"
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: ghcr.io/kubestellar/infra/build:1.24.2-1
-          command:
-            - make
-            - verify-boilerplate
-            - verify-codegen
-            - verify-go-versions
-            - verify-imports
-            - verify-modules
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 1Gi
-              cpu: 1
-
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-lint
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar"
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: ghcr.io/kubestellar/infra/build:1.24.2-1
-          command:
-            - make
-            - lint
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 4Gi
-              cpu: 2
-
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-test-unit
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar"
-    labels:
-      preset-goproxy: "true"
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: ghcr.io/kubestellar/infra/build:1.24.2-1
-          command:
-            - make
-            - test
-          env:
-            - name: USE_GOTESTSUM
-              value: "1"
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 4Gi
-              cpu: 2++
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-name: Mark and close stale issues
-
-on:
-  schedule:
-    - cron: "0 0 * * *"
-  workflow_dispatch: {}
-
-jobs:
-  stale:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-stale.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
